scope.target: Governed v0.3.0 to published v0.4.0 upgrade
constraints: Preserve target-owned source includes and local validators
Do not update provenance before validation

steps: Run v0.4.0 planner with v0.3.0 baseline
Review moves, merges, retirements, and semantic contracts
execution.last_completed_step: Validated the final v0.4.0 target, recorded provenance, and removed the pending apply receipt
execution.next_action: Run the independent post-upgrade audit under AICUP-004

results.summary: Applied 151 planner-safe operations, reconciled 15 target-modified paths, adopted v0.4.0 contracts, and retained 65 explicit downstream deviations with no missing package paths.
results.residual_risk: The upstream v0.4.0 archive exposes clean-install migration metadata and source-only release/package tests; workflow-local derived metadata and target runner overrides are retained as evidence.
